name: hri-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ACM/IEEE HRI (the International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction): the five-track full-paper model (User Studies, Technical, Design, Theory and Methods, Systems), the two-phase double-blind review with rebuttal, PCS submission, the 8-page acmart budget, human-subjects/IRB and study-design rigor (Wizard-of-Oz, between/within-subjects, effect sizes, validated scales), the mandatory video figure, ACM+IEEE dual publication, and the alt.HRI / Late-Breaking Reports / video / Student Design tracks. Grounded in the HRI 2026 (Edinburgh) and HRI 2027 (Santa Clara) calls, the humanrobotinteraction.org pages, ACM DL, IEEE Xplore, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
